Title: Provides that certain institutions of higher education shall meet certain standards that do not infringe upon academic freedom
Summary: Provides that certain institutions of higher education shall meet certain standards or adopt rules that do not infringe upon academic freedom; provides that academic freedom shall be defined by the 1940 Statement of Principles on Academic Freedom and Tenure with 1970 Interpretive Comments; establishes courses of action that may be taken int the event of alleged violations of academic freedom.
LawCode: Amd §§6401 & 6430, Ed L; add §216, Civ Serv L; add §79-r, Civ Rts L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, the civil service law, and the civil rights law, in relation to protecting academic freedom for employees at higher education institutions
